moments.title: World Cup 2026 Aftermath
moments.blurb: Spain lifted the FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy after a dramatic 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina on Sunday, still the talk of the football world.

angles.name: Spain's Victory
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Sunday's World Cup final? Spain are champions after a hard-fought 1-0 win over Argentina! What a tournament. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Argentina's Heartbreak
angles.copy: Argentina's World Cup dream ended in extra time on Sunday as Spain clinched the trophy. Tough one for Messi and the team. Were you watching?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 is set to bring David Byrne, Teddy Swims and Lewis Capaldi to Henham Park in Suffolk from Thursday 23rd to Sunday 26th July.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude Festival this weekend? David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are just some of the huge names descending on Suffolk!

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing four days of music, comedy, and arts to Henham Park starting Thursday. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Kendal Calling Approaching
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling 2026 returns to the Lake District's Lowther Deer Park from Thursday 30th July to Sunday 2nd August, featuring headliners Biffy Clyro, Wolf Alice, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Kooks.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Counting down to Kendal Calling next week! Biffy Clyro, Wolf Alice, and Two Door Cinema Club are among the acts ready to rock the Lake District. Are you going?

angles.name: Lake District Festival
angles.copy: The Lake District is gearing up for Kendal Calling, starting July 30th! Four days of incredible music and good vibes. What's your top festival memory?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week of July 19-25, 2026, sees 'REIN ME IN' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean holding strong at Number 1.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New week, same #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'REIN ME IN' is still dominating the Official UK Singles Chart. Is it on your playlist?

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: What tracks are you rinsing this week? The Official UK Singles Chart is out, and Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding that top spot!

moments.title: Happy 85th, George Clinton
moments.blurb: The legendary 'Godfather of Funk', George Clinton, turns 85 tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Icon Turns 85
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday tomorrow to the one and only George Clinton! The funk architect behind Parliament-Funkadelic. What's your favourite P-Funk track?

angles.name: Godfather of Funk
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 22nd, we celebrate the 85th birthday of George Clinton! Dive into the incredible world of funk he created.

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: The Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Turns 79
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday tomorrow to Don Henley! The iconic voice and drummer of The Eagles. What's your favourite Eagles song with Don on lead vocals?

angles.name: Classic Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 22nd, we raise a glass to Don Henley on his 79th birthday! A true legend of classic rock.

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow's a big day for Selena Gomez as she turns 34! What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez tomorrow! From Disney to global pop icon, she's done it all.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar hero Slash, born Saul Hudson, turns 61 on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash this Thursday! That top hat and those riffs are unmistakable. What's your favourite Guns N' Roses solo?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: This Thursday, July 23rd, we celebrate the 61st birthday of rock legend Slash! Still shredding after all these years.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday this Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday
angles.copy: Jenny from the Block turns 57 this Friday! Happy Birthday to the unstoppable Jennifer Lopez. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Pop Diva Celebration
angles.copy: This Friday, July 24th, we're celebrating the 57th birthday of Jennifer Lopez! Still ruling the stage and screen.

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! The ultimate rock and roll showman. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: This Sunday, July 26th, we're celebrating the 83rd birthday of the legendary Mick Jagger! Still got the moves.

moments.title: Sum 41's Dave Baksh Turns 46
moments.blurb: Sum 41 guitarist Dave Baksh, also known as 'Brownsound', celebrates his 46th birthday this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Sum 41 Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Sum 41's incredible guitarist, Dave Baksh, this Sunday! Still rocking hard. What's your favourite Sum 41 track?

angles.name: Rock Birthday
angles.copy: This Sunday, July 26th, we're celebrating Dave Baksh's 46th birthday! Send your birthday wishes to the Sum 41 legend.

moments.title: Taylor Momsen Turns 33
moments.blurb: The Pretty Reckless frontwoman and actress Taylor Momsen celebrates her 33rd birthday this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: The Pretty Reckless
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to Taylor Momsen this Sunday! The powerful voice of The Pretty Reckless. What's your favourite song from them?

angles.name: Rock Voice Birthday
angles.copy: This Sunday, July 26th, we're wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to Taylor Momsen! From acting to rock star, she's a force.

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Legendary DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, real name Norman Cook, celebrates his 63rd birthday next week on Thursday, July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Next Thursday, July 31st, Fatboy Slim turns 63! Still bringing those iconic big beat vibes. What's your favourite track to get you dancing?

angles.name: Dance Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the 63rd birthday of the one and only Fatboy Slim next Thursday! A true pioneer of dance music.

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are now underway across much of the UK, with schools breaking up for the longest break of the year.

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: School's out for summer across the UK! Whether you're staycationing or jetting off, enjoy the break. What are your summer plans?

angles.name: Summer Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Time for sunshine, adventures, and making memories. What's top of your summer bucket list?

moments.title: Welsh Summer Holidays Continue
moments.blurb: Schools across Wales have been on summer holiday since late June, with the break continuing until mid-August.

angles.name: Wales Holiday Vibes
angles.copy: Summer holidays are in full swing across Wales! Plenty of time left for beach days, mountain hikes, and family fun. What's your favourite Welsh summer spot?

angles.name: Local Welsh Fun
angles.copy: Looking for ideas to keep the kids entertained during the Welsh summer holidays? We've got you covered with local events and attractions!

moments.title: Devon Schools Break for Summer
moments.blurb: Schools in Devon begin their summer holidays this Friday, July 25th, kickstarting the busiest period for the county.

angles.name: Devon Holiday Start
angles.copy: This Friday, Devon schools break up for the summer holidays! Get ready for bustling beaches, local events, and plenty of sunshine (hopefully!). What are your plans?

angles.name: Exeter Summer
angles.copy: Summer holidays officially begin for Devon schools this Friday, July 25th! Perfect time to explore everything Exeter and the wider county has to offer.

moments.title: Scotland's Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Today, July 21st, marks the start of the summer holidays for many schools across Scotland.

angles.name: Scotland Holiday Start
angles.copy: Happy summer holidays, Scotland! Many schools are breaking up today, July 21st. Time for adventures across our beautiful country.

angles.name: Scottish Summer Plans
angles.copy: The long-awaited summer holidays begin today for many in Scotland! What are your plans for the break – staycation or exploring further afield?
